title: AI Steerability 360: A Toolkit for Steering Large Language Models
what_happened: arXiv:2603.07837v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The AI Steerability 360 toolkit is an extensible, open-source Python library for steering LLMs. Steering abstractions are designed around four model control surfaces: input (modification of the prompt), structural (modification of the model's weights or architecture), state (modification of the mode

title: How NVIDIA Builds Open Data for AI
what_happened: Hugging Face Blog announced 'How NVIDIA Builds Open Data for AI', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.

title: Investors bet $1 billion on Yann LeCun's vision for AI beyond LLMs
what_happened: Yann LeCun, former chief AI scientist at Meta and Turing Award winner, has raised over $1 billion for his new startup Advanced Machine Intelligence Labs (AMI Labs) - making it Europe's largest seed funding round ever. The article Investors bet $1 billion on Yann LeCun's vision for AI beyond LLMs appeared first on The Decoder.

title: Amazon gets court order blocking Perplexity's AI shopping agent
what_happened: Amazon stops Perplexity's shopping bot by court order: a ruling that could shape the future of AI agents in e-commerce. The article Amazon gets court order blocking Perplexity's AI shopping agent appeared first on The Decoder.

title: ABB: Physical AI simulation boosts ROI for factory automation
what_happened: A new ABB and NVIDIA partnership shows physical AI simulation is driving real ROI in factory automation and solving production hurdles. Manufacturers have often found it difficult to make intelligent robotics work reliably outside testing environments.
